data.name: Seek Girl Ⅲ
data.detailed_description:
加入Discord社區

我們現已開通discord社區，如果你有任何問題（￣y▽，￣）╭，請點擊右側discord連結（即支持語言的下方）加入我們┏（゜ ω ゜）=☞

你有任何問題嗎？ 我猜你有！！

遊戲介紹

這是一個有趣的休閒解密遊戲，可訓練您的觀察力。

在遊戲開始時，遊戲將顯示黑色形狀。你需要查找形狀與黑色相同的形狀。該黑色形狀也可以由兩個項目組成。然後，你必須尋找兩個項目。當你完成全部三組項目的任務後，就可以開始下一步啦！

從觀察開始遊戲，不要放過任何角落。

data.short_description: 這是一個有趣的休閒解密遊戲，可訓練您的觀察力。 在遊戲開始時，遊戲將顯示黑色形狀，您需要找到一個或兩個與黑色形狀相同的項目才能完成任務。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA Gef
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Sound Device

data.name: Seek Girl Ⅲ
data.detailed_description:
Join the Discord

We have now opened the discord community, if you have any questions(￣y▽,￣)╭, please click the discord link on the right of (that is, support language below) join us ┏(゜ω ゜)=☞

Do you have any questions? I guess you have! !

This is a fun casual decryption game that trains your observations.

At the beginning of the game, the game will show a black shape. You want to find an item with the same shape as black. This black shape may also be composed of two objects. Then you have to look for two items. When you find After completing the task with three sets of items, you can start the next step.

Start your game with your observations and don't let go of any corner.

data.short_description: This is a fun casual decryption game that trains your observations. At the beginning of the game, the game will show a black shape, you need to find one or two items of the same shape as black to complete the task.
data.supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA Gef
  • Storage: 400 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 Sound Device
